error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the GL.iNet router. Check the host address and ensure the router is online.
error.invalid_response: The router returned an unexpected or invalid response.
error.host_required: Please enter a router IP address.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This GL.iNet router is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No GL.iNet routers found on the network.

user.title: Select GL.iNet Router
user.description: Choose a discovered router or select 'No device found' to enter details manually.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate GL.iNet Router
reauth_confirm.description: Your GL.iNet router credentials have expired. Please re-enter them.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Configuration entry ID of the router to reboot.
